scenes.narrationText: Welcome to the Aurora E1 — the future of luxury electric driving. Take a moment, look around. This is where redefinition begins.
Every line of the Aurora E1 is sculpted for both elegance and aerodynamics. Look around to discover what defines its presence.

hotspots.label: Adaptive Matrix Headlights
hotspots.description: 12,000 individually controlled LEDs adapt to traffic, weather, and curves in real time.

hotspots.label: 21" Aero-Forged Alloys
hotspots.description: Lightweight forged alloys with active aero shutters reduce drag at highway speeds.

hotspots.label: 350 kW Ultra-Fast Charging
hotspots.description: 10% to 80% in 18 minutes on compatible DC fast chargers.

hotspots.label: Sculpted Aluminium Body
hotspots.description: Drag coefficient of 0.21 — among the lowest in its class.

scenes.narrationText: Step into a cabin that feels less like a car interior and more like a private lounge. Every surface, every sound — engineered around you.

hotspots.label: Curved 14.6" OLED Display
hotspots.description: Glanceable navigation, vehicle telemetry, and immersive media in one seamless surface.

hotspots.label: Panoramic Smart Glass Roof
hotspots.description: Electrochromic glass dims at the touch of a button for instant privacy.

hotspots.label: 256-Color Ambient Lighting
hotspots.description: Mood-synced lighting that responds to drive mode, music, and time of day.

hotspots.label: 20-Speaker Spatial Audio
hotspots.description: Concert-grade Dolby Atmos tuned for the cabin's acoustic geometry.

scenes.narrationText: Out on the open road, the Aurora E1 is more than capable — it's exhilarating.

hotspots.label: Range: 620 km (WLTP)
hotspots.description: Class-leading 110 kWh battery with adaptive thermal management.

hotspots.label: Top Speed: 250 km/h
hotspots.description: Electronically limited. Aerodynamics calibrated for stability at all speeds.

scenes.narrationText: The Aurora E1 isn't just a car. It's a statement. Are you ready to drive the future?
